calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES FOR THURSDAY, JULY-12-2012: ATTORNEY BRENDA CRUZ KEITH, ESQ. APPEARS FOR RESPONDENT DARRIL HUDSON, WHO IS ALSO PRESENT; MR. JASON GONZALEZ APPEARS FOR APPELLANT LVMH FASHION GROUP AMERICAS, INC. DBA LOUIS VUITTON & LOUIS VUITTON USA, INC.

THE COURT HEARS STATEMENTS PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES; DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED BUT NOT RETAINED BY THE COURT.
AFTER HEARING ALL STATEMENTS AND ARGUMENT PRESENTED BY BOTH SIDES, THE COURT TAKES THE MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

PRO TEM JUDGE MARC SEIDENFELD; CLERK MARJORIE L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 525).

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
